

# Cross-Platform Smoke Test Checklist

Use this quick checklist to confirm the app works on newly supported platforms.
Focus on basic functionality only — not full regression testing.

---

## App Startup & Connection

* [ ] App launches without crashing
* [ ] Connect to Suwayomi server
* [ ] Login/auth works if required
* [ ] App does not freeze during startup
* [ ] Settings persist after restart

---

## Library & Navigation

* [ ] Library loads successfully
* [ ] Manga covers display correctly
* [ ] Manga titles display correctly
* [ ] Navigation between tabs works
* [ ] No UI layout issues (cut off text, oversized elements)

---

## Manga & Chapters

* [ ] Open manga details page
* [ ] Chapter list loads
* [ ] Can open a chapter
* [ ] Chapters show correct title/order

---

## Reader

* [ ] Pages load correctly
* [ ] Can move between pages
* [ ] Exit reader successfully
* [ ] Resume chapter saves progress

---

## Search & Browse

* [ ] Browse sources works
* [ ] Search returns results
* [ ] Can open manga from search results

---

## Basic Features

* [ ] Downloads tab opens without crashing
* [ ] History tab opens without crashing
* [ ] Settings menu opens
* [ ] Changing a setting saves correctly

---

## Platform-Specific Checks

* [ ] Input works (controller / keyboard / touch)
* [ ] UI scaling looks correct
* [ ] No missing icons or fonts
* [ ] No crashes when switching tabs
* [ ] App works after restart

---

## Super Quick Test (minimum)

If short on time, verify:

* [ ] App launches
* [ ] Connect to server
* [ ] Open library
* [ ] Open manga
* [ ] Open chapter
* [ ] Turn pages
* [ ] Search works
* [ ] Settings open
* [ ] Restart app successfully
